creator: tomek@cedro.info
text: The FreeBSD 9.0 is not yet STABLE/PRODUCTION. This even won't install. See how many bugs are there and ask yourself why unstable and buggy release is considered stable/production...This is not a FreeBSD style, this is Linux style :-( I just wait for people to start complaining that their production systems that switched into 9.0 does not perform their job...
